Dorothy wakes up following the cyclone to find herself not in a storm-ravaged Kansas, but in a lush, colorful landscape filled with flowers and fruit.
Dorothy is disheveled, waking up in a state of confusion following a cyclone.
Dorothy is looking out at the landscape in a state of wonder and awe.
Dorothy wakes up and discovers her new surroundings.
